title: Rich Crunchy Delight Slovakian Char-Grill-Yang Fondue
description: A Slovakian-inspired dish featuring natural yoghurt, char-grill-yang, and crunchy texture, perfect for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Combine the natural yoghurt, char-grill-yang sauce, and honey in a bowl and mix well.
Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
Add the crushed almonds and walnuts to the melted butter and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the Slovakian cheese to the saucepan and stir until melted.
Add the sour cream to the saucepan and stir until combined.
Transfer the cheese mixture to a fondue pot and add the fresh thyme and rosemary sprigs.
Season with fleur de sel and black pepper to taste.
Dip slices of bread, crackers, or vegetables into the fondue and enjoy.
Serve immediately and keep the fondue warm by placing the fondue pot on a heat source, such as a candle or a low flame.
If the fondue thickens too much, add a little more char-grill-yang sauce to thin it out.
If the fondue is too thin, add a little more cheese to thicken it up.
Repeat the dipping and serving process until the fondue is gone or the cheese is all melted.
